pages.text: Long ago, all the animals lived in a village. Mama Antelope had a big house.

blocks.text: Long ago, all the animals lived in a village. Mama Antelope had a big house.

pages.text: One day, Hare wanted to play a trick. He thought and thought and thought… He crept into Mama Antelope’s house. He closed the door and made a lot of noise.

blocks.text: One day, Hare wanted to play a trick. He thought and thought and thought… He crept into Mama Antelope’s house. He closed the door and made a lot of noise.

pages.text: Mama Antelope came home. “Who is in my house?” she cried. Someone “Hyena, is please in my help! house.” PING! CLINK!

blocks.text: Mama Antelope came home. “Who is in my house?” she cried.
Someone “Hyena, is please in my help! house.”
PING!
CLINK!

pages.text: Knock, knock, knock! “Open the door!” howled Hyena. But the door did not open. CRASH! SNAP!

blocks.text: Knock, knock, knock! “Open the door!” howled Hyena. But the door did not open.
CRASH!
SNAP!

pages.text: Hyena called Giraffe. “Open the door!” shouted Giraffe. BANG! SMASH! But the door did not open.

blocks.text: Hyena called Giraffe. “Open the door!” shouted Giraffe.
BANG!
SMASH!
But the door did not open.

pages.text: Giraffe called Zebra. “Open the door!” yelled Zebra. But the door did not open. BASH! BOOM!

blocks.text: Giraffe called Zebra. “Open the door!” yelled Zebra. But the door did not open.
BASH! BOOM!

pages.text: Mama Antelope was sad. All the animals were sad. Who was in Mama Antelope’s house?

blocks.text: Mama Antelope was sad. All the animals were sad.
Who was in Mama Antelope’s house?

pages.text: The birds sang. The butterflies flapped. The bees buzzed. “Open the door!” they all cried.

blocks.text: The birds sang. The butterflies flapped. The bees buzzed. “Open the door!” they all cried.

pages.text: Baby Antelope came home. “Who is in our house?” “Please open the door,” she asked sweetly.

blocks.text: Baby Antelope came home. “Who is in our house?”
“Please open the door,” she asked sweetly.

pages.text: The door opened. It was Hare! Hare was smiling. He loved tricks.

blocks.text: The door opened. It was Hare! Hare was smiling. He loved tricks.

pages.text: Hurrah! Hurrah! Mama Antelope and Baby Antelope are happy. The animals are happy. Mama Antelope’s house is open at last.
